g.title: data_model_validation
g.text: Validation — MVP formats × operations (does the model carry what each needs?)

g.title: legend
g.text: Y = yes · ~ = partial (one event/value only) · N = not from this format
The Flame-chart + Metric columns are N exactly for the aggregated formats (folded, pprof) —
they carry no per-sample time. That's the hasTiming flag doing its job, not a model gap.
pprof uniquely carries multi-value; .cpuprofile uniquely (among the easy ones) carries time.
